SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-23-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
